name: NVIDIA Shader Cache
description: Precompiled graphics shaders for NVIDIA GPUs.
impact: Games might experience slight stuttering on next launch while shaders are rebuilt.

name: AMD Shader Cache
description: Precompiled graphics shaders for AMD GPUs.
impact: Games might experience slight stuttering on next launch while shaders are rebuilt.

name: Steam Download Cache
description: Temporary files for currently downloading Steam games.
impact: Active downloads will be interrupted or restarted. Only delete if Steam is closed and no downloads are queued.

name: Epic Games Web Cache
description: Cached web content for the Epic Games Launcher.
impact: The launcher may take slightly longer to load the store page next time.

name: EA Desktop Cache
description: Cached data and images for the EA Desktop app.
impact: The launcher may take slightly longer to load the store page next time.

name: Steam Crash Dumps
description: Crash reports and memory dumps from the Steam client.
impact: You won't be able to send past crash reports to Valve. Completely safe to delete.

name: Riot Games Logs
description: Massive text logs from League of Legends and Riot Client.
impact: You won't be able to provide support logs for past games if requested by Riot Support.
